_help.whale_address: the Hyperliquid wallet you are copying
_help.my_capital_usd: paper mode: your pretend starting money. live mode: informational only, real balance is read from your account
_help.mode: 'paper' = simulated, no real money (START HERE). 'live' = real orders on your Hyperliquid account
_help.network: 'mainnet' or 'testnet' (testnet = Hyperliquid's free practice environment, works with live mode)
_help.max_position_fraction: hard cap: never put more than this fraction of your money in one trade (0.25 = 25%)
_help.min_viable_balance_usd: if your balance drops below this, the bot stops opening new trades and alerts you
_help.max_signal_age_seconds: ignore whale trades we heard about too late
_help.my_address: live mode only: your Hyperliquid wallet address
_help.private_key_env: live mode only: NAME of the environment variable that holds your API wallet private key. Never write the key itself in this file.
